name: Credit for Foreign Death Taxes

eligibility.description: The estate must include property situated in a foreign country (or U.S. possession) that was subjected to foreign death taxes and is also included in the U.S. gross estate.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows a credit against U.S. federal estate tax for the amount of any estate, inheritance, legacy, or succession taxes actually paid to a foreign country on property situated there.
